_comments.LogDB:ApiKey: Required: Your LogDB API key for gRPC authentication
_comments.LogDB:ServiceUrl: Optional: Override gRPC service URL (leave unset to use discovery service)
_comments.Server:ServerName: Unique identifier for this server (defaults to machine name)
_comments.IIS:LogSources: Log sources with format per path. Format: Auto (detect), W3C (standard IIS .log), AzureJson (Azure App Service NDJSON)
_comments.IIS:LogPaths: Backward compat: simple path list (treated as Format=Auto). Use LogSources for explicit format control.
_comments.IIS:Collection: Optional: LogDB collection name (if empty, auto-generates from folder name e.g. iis-logs-w3svc1)
_comments.IIS:CollectionMap: Optional: Map IIS site names to specific collections, e.g. { "MySite": "my-site-logs" }
_comments.IIS:SiteNames: Optional: Only process these IIS site names
_comments.IIS:IncludeStatusCodes: Optional: Only include these HTTP status codes
_comments.IIS:ExcludeStatusCodes: Optional: Exclude these HTTP status codes
_comments.IIS:IncludeDirectories: Optional: Only process these directories (e.g. ["W3SVC1", "W3SVC3"]). Empty = all.
_comments.IIS:FilterConditions: Optional: Advanced JSON filter (MinTimeTaken, ExcludeIps, IncludeMethods, etc.)
